  "findings": [
    "Condenser/heat pump clearance to wall or adjacent units is below the manufacturer's specified minimum."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Relocate the unit(s) to meet the minimum clearance requirements specified in the manufacturer's installation manual before final inspection."
  ],
  "rationale": "The installation violates both the manufacturer's installation instructions and IMC/IRC M1401 (which requires equipment to be installed in accordance with its listing and manufacturer's instructions). Insufficient clearance restricts airflow, reduces system efficiency, and can lead to premature compressor failure.",
